chain.thought:
Filter out useless columns.
similar words of the question link to columns:
album -> album title
column value of the question link to columns:
first -> release date
semantic sentence of the question link to columns:
released first -> release date

The question is asking to determine which album was released first. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "release date" column in the order of "small to large" using the f_sort_column(release date) operation. This will arrange the albums from the earliest release date to the latest, allowing us to see which album was released first.
The first album released was "HOTSILOG: The ASAP Hotdog Compilation" on October 8, 2006.
